title: product-file
description: One JSON file per product (e.g. qshs.json, vs.json, qs_gate.json). Groups all table rows under table-name keys. Gates are authored in their own file (e.g. qs_gate.json), not nested under a fence file. The Node upserter at supabase/seeds/tools/seed-products.js reads files matching this schema and upserts each section in dependency order (products → product_components → pricing_rules). Calculation rules are NOT seed data — they live in code+config under supabase/functions/bom-calculator-static/config/.

org_slug.description: Business key for the owning organisation. Applied to every row in this file — do NOT repeat org_slug on individual rows.
